questionHtml: Each of the mesocosms is an open ecosystem. State the property that makes the mesocosms open ecosystems.
markschemeHtml:
there is exchange of matter/energy
OR
there is an exchange between the surface of the water and the atmosphere ✔

 eg: matter could be nutrients/gas/water/minerals/etc; energy could be heat or light

meta.title: Each of the mesocosms is an open ecosystem. State the property that makes the mesocosms open ecosystems.
